decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id route_m34-sbs already exists as a canonical registry record with the observation's source (120507_brt_cb6_34th_street) attached, the alias route_m34-sbs-2012 already present, and matching payload (M34 SBS, Select Bus Service, Manhattan). The observation already resolves to this record — linking to one's own base_record_id is prohibited.
